Name: CRIMINAL_AND_DECEASED_PARAM
Description: Controls criminal status, deceased/hollow progression, threshold levels, and HP limits associated with these states.

Fields.Name: Criminal Counter Increase (Network)
Fields.Description: Amount added to the criminal counter through online/network-related actions.

Fields.Name: Criminal Counter Decrease (Network)
Fields.Description: Amount removed from the criminal counter through online/network-related actions.

Fields.Name: Criminal Counter Increase (NPC)
Fields.Description: Amount added to the criminal counter when committing crimes against NPCs.

Fields.Name: Criminal Level Threshold (Normal -> Criminal)
Fields.Description: Threshold value at which a character transitions between normal and criminal status.

Fields.Name: Major Criminal Level Threshold (Criminal -> Major Criminal)
Fields.Description: Threshold value at which a criminal becomes a major criminal.

Fields.Name: Deceased Counter Increase (Normal)
Fields.Description: Amount added to the deceased/hollow counter from standard death.

Fields.Name: Deceased Counter Increase (Cursed Death)
Fields.Description: Amount added to the deceased/hollow counter from cursed death.

Fields.Name: Deceased Level Threshold (Deceased -> Advanced Deceased)
Fields.Description: Threshold value at which the deceased/hollow state advances to a more severe stage.

Fields.Name: HP Lower Bound % (Normal / Criminal)
Fields.Description: Minimum HP percentage limit applied while in normal or criminal state.

Fields.Name: HP Lower Bound % (Major Criminal)
Fields.Description: Minimum HP percentage limit applied while in major criminal state.

Fields.Name: HP Upper Bound % (Curse)
Fields.Description: Maximum HP percentage limit applied while under curse effects.
